bridge-dab-sql.description: Data API Builder MCP SQL server for the Bridge accelerator. Exposes 6 DML tools (describe_entities, create_record, read_records, update_record, delete_record, execute_entity) against the PostgreSQL PM-demo schema, with RBAC enforced per-role (Owner, Admin, ProjectManager, TeamMember, Viewer). Requires Aspire AppHost to be running — the DAB container is bound to localhost:5000 via Aspire's endpoint discovery; adjust the URL if the Aspire-assigned port differs (check dashboard).
